title: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 20 June 2025
section_path: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 20 June 2025
section_path_text: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 20 June 2025
summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 21/06/2025
This week offered little change across key ship recycling markets, with conditions remaining largely flat and sentiment subdued. Source: Best Oasis Limited

Linked asset: 2025-06-21_Weekly-Ship-Recycling-Report-14-June-20-June-2025_compressed.pdf
Source asset: reports/hellenic/demolition/pdfs/2025-06-21_Weekly-Ship-Recycling-Report-14-June-20-June-2025_compressed.pdf

[Page 1]
Weekly Ship Recycling Report
14 June - 20 June 2025
Visit : www.best-oasis.com Head Office: 3201, Saba Tower 1, Cluster E, Jumeirah Lake Towers, Dubai, U.A.E
Email: bol@bol.ae Contact: +971 4575 4667

[Page 2]
Highlights of the week
This week offered little change across key ship recycling markets, with conditions remaining largely flat and sentiment subdued. Seasonal pressures in India
continued to weigh on activity, as the advancing monsoon dampens steel demand, keeping end users on the sidelines.
